message:
chore(web): add smooth transitions to collapsible triggers

- SessionActions: add transition-all duration-150 to both CollapsibleTrigger elements
- CollapsibleCard/Section: add transition-all duration-150 for smooth hover/active state changes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.3","title":"Web: sessions UI (create/list/detail + artifact panel)","description":"# Goal
A session page should show:
- current research thread
- agent responses timeline
- compiled artifact (live-updating as responses arrive)
- next-step buttons (compile, request critique round, etc.)

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4","title":"Web: lab mode auth + gating (protect Agent Mail actions)","description":"# Goal
Public site must not allow orchestration side-effects.

Implement gating for:
- session kickoff send
- thread fetch actions (if sensitive)
- any artifact persistence

Preferred: Cloudflare Access and/or app-layer shared secret.
","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:25:21.536656468-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T23:51:30.243904321-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T23:51:30.243904321-05:00","close_reason":"All children complete: threat model defined (5so.4.4.1), server action gating enforced with isLabModeEnabled() and checkOrchestrationAuth() (5so.4.4.2), and LockedState UX component added (5so.4.4.3). Public site now protected against unauthorized orchestration.","labels":["security","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:25:21.537719699-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4.1","title":"Define threat model + choose auth mechanism","description":"Define:
- who should access lab mode
- what endpoints are dangerous
- preferred gating (Cloudflare Access vs app secret vs both)

Done when: a clear security model exists.
","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:25:56.598826721-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:18:17.914713711-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:18:17.914713711-05:00","close_reason":"Created threat_model_lab_mode_v0.1.md with full threat analysis, CF Access + app-layer fallback recommendation, implementation spec","labels":["security","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4.1","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:25:56.599677442-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4.2","title":"Enforce auth + lab mode gating on server actions","description":"Implement hard fail-closed checks around:
- sending messages
- reading sensitive data

Done when: public users cannot trigger orchestration.
","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:25:56.630690742-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:46:16.102574229-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T21:46:16.102574229-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented defense-in-depth auth: lib/auth.ts with isLabModeEnabled + hasValidLabSecret checks; middleware protects /sessions/*; server action uses checkOrchestrationAuth(); .env.example documents BRENNER_LAB_SECRET","labels":["security","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:25:56.631673552-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4.2","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.4.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:33:42.037235273-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
